overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features holographic advertisements, wet pavement reflections, and futuristic architecture with prominent pink and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an overpass, passing by illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on steps near the teal building facade
person walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large pink holographic advertisement displaying a human figure, visible above the street
building exterior with glowing cyan neon trim and vertical light strips
elevated highway or walkway crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet neon-lit sidewalk at night, approaching an elevated overpass. The wet pavement reflects vibrant pink light from a large holographic billboard ahead and cyan light from a building facade on the left. Sparse pedestrians move along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with industrial lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the overpass, shifting from neon to yellow lighting
pedestrian in red cap passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: person in red cap and dark clothing walking past the camera
person walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete underside of the elevated highway with exposed structural beams
long fluorescent light strips mounted along the overpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, illuminated by yellow linear lights overhead. The space is enclosed with concrete barriers and walls, creating an industrial atmosphere distinct from the open neon street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and transit shelters

events.description: exits the covered overpass into open street with visible sky and buildings ahead
approaching Foodscape restaurant with bright red neon signage becoming prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Foodscape restaurant following a pedestrian in a blue jacket

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead toward the Foodscape restaurant
futuristic black car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' mounted on the restaurant facade
transit shelter with glowing pink roof and cyan accents
tall modern building with illuminated windows and vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass into a commercial district with the Foodscape restaurant's red neon sign prominent on the left. The street curves gently right toward a pink-lit bus shelter, with modern glass towers rising in the background and wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant neon-lit sidewalk through a stark industrial underpass and into a bustling commercial district. It begins by moving along a wet pavement that mirrors brilliant pink and cyan hues from holographic billboards and building facades. As the camera advances, the open street gives way to a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where the atmosphere shifts to a confined industrial space illuminated by yellow linear overhead lights. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the overpass, transitioning back into the neon glow of a commercial area marked by the red sign of a Foodscape restaurant. Finally, the path curves gently toward a pink-lit bus shelter, framed by towering glass skyscrapers reflecting off the rain-slicked ground.
